requirement_topic.en: Fire Safety & Thermal Runaway Propagation — BESS (EU/International)
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统消防安全与热失控扩散（欧盟／国际）
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統消防安全與熱失控擴散（歐盟／國際）

summary.en: IEC 62933-5-2:2020 sets safety requirements for grid-connected energy storage systems, including evaluation of thermal runaway propagation at cell, module and system level. Ed 2.0 remains in development and does not supersede the 2020 edition for this dataset. Installations must demonstrate that thermal runaway in one cell does not propagate uncontrolled to adjacent cells/modules. Many EU member-state building codes and installers additionally require UL 9540A fire-test data to quantify heat release and propagation risk for fire-compartment design. EN IEC 62933-5-2 is the harmonised European adoption (harmonised status under OJ review as of 2026-06-11).
summary.zh: IEC 62933-5-2:2020为并网储能系统规定了安全要求，包括在电芯、模组和系统层级对热失控扩散进行评估。Ed 2.0仍在制定中，在本数据集中不视为取代2020年版。安装项目须证明单一电芯热失控不会不受控地蔓延至相邻电芯或模组。欧盟多个成员国的建筑规范及安装商亦额外要求提供UL 9540A火灾试验数据，用于量化释热量与扩散风险，以便进行防火分区设计。EN IEC 62933-5-2为该标准的欧洲协调版本（截至2026-06-11，协调标准官方公报登录状态在审）。
summary.zht: IEC 62933-5-2:2020為並網儲能系統規定安全要求，包括在電芯、模組及系統層級對熱失控擴散進行評估。Ed 2.0仍在制定中，在本數據集中不視為取代2020年版。安裝項目須證明單一電芯熱失控不會不受控地蔓延至相鄰電芯或模組。歐盟多個成員國的建築規範及安裝商亦額外要求提供UL 9540A火災試驗數據，用以量化釋熱量與擴散風險，以便進行防火分區設計。EN IEC 62933-5-2為該標準的歐洲協調版本（截至2026-06-11，協調標準官方公報登錄狀態在審）。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-2:2020 — Electrical energy storage (EES) systems – Part 5-2: Safety requirements for grid-integrated EES systems
EN IEC 62933-5-2 (harmonised EU adoption — harmonised status under review as of 2026-06-11 due to Malamud ruling)

ANSI/CAN/UL 9540A:2025 (5th Edition, published March 12, 2025) — Test Method for Evaluating Thermal Runaway Fire Propagation in Battery Energy Storage Systems (supersedes the 2019 4th Edition; a 6th Edition was published March 2026)

summary.en: GB/T 36276-2023 (revised, released 6 August 2023 by SAC/SAMR, in force from 1 March 2024, superseding GB/T 36276-2018) covers lithium-ion battery packs and systems for stationary energy storage, including thermal-runaway tests at cell and module level. The 2023 revision tightened test conditions (e.g. external short-circuit resistance reduced from 5 mΩ to 1 mΩ) and expanded abuse-test coverage. However, the propagation-prevention test methodology and pass/fail thresholds differ from IEC 62933-5-2. GB/T 36276 does not adopt UL 9540A protocols, and system-level fire-compartment propagation data generated under Chinese test conditions is generally not in the format required by EU installers or AHJs.
summary.zh: GB/T 36276-2023（修订版，国家标准化管理委员会/国家市场监督管理总局于2023年8月6日发布，2024年3月1日起实施，取代GB/T 36276-2018）涵盖固定式储能用锂离子电池包及系统，包含电芯和模组层级的热失控试验。2023年修订版收紧了试验条件（如外部短路电阻由5 mΩ降至1 mΩ）并扩展了滥用测试范围。然而，其扩散防止试验方法与合格判定准则与IEC 62933-5-2存在差异。GB/T 36276未采用UL 9540A测试规程，依中国试验条件生成的系统级防火分区扩散数据，通常无法满足欧盟安装商或主管当局所要求的格式。
summary.zht: GB/T 36276-2023（修訂版，國家標準化管理委員會/國家市場監督管理總局於2023年8月6日發布，2024年3月1日起實施，取代GB/T 36276-2018）涵蓋固定式儲能用鋰離子電池包及系統，包含電芯和模組層級的熱失控試驗。2023年修訂版收緊了試驗條件（如外部短路電阻由5 mΩ降至1 mΩ）並擴展了濫用測試範圍。然而，其擴散防止試驗方法與合格判定準則與IEC 62933-5-2存在差異。GB/T 36276未採用UL 9540A測試規程，依中國試驗條件生成的系統級防火分區擴散數據，通常無法滿足歐盟安裝商或主管當局所要求的格式。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 — Lithium-ion battery packs and systems for electric energy storage (released 6 August 2023, in force 1 March 2024, supersedes GB/T 36276-2018; recommended national standard)
GB/T 51048-2025 — Standard for Design of Electrochemical Energy Storage Power Station (supersedes GB 51048-2014; issued 31 December 2025, effective 1 April 2026)

gap.en: Key gap: Chinese test reports under GB/T 36276 typically do not include the system-level thermal-runaway propagation test data required by IEC 62933-5-2 Annex C, nor UL 9540A heat-release-rate (HRR) and fire-spread data needed for EU building/fire-compartment approvals. EU installers and AHJs increasingly request UL 9540A-format data even where not legally mandated, because it feeds fire-compartment sizing calculations. Chinese manufacturers rarely commission UL 9540A tests. This documentation gap is a frequent barrier at the EU project-finance and permitting stage.
gap.zh: 主要差距：依GB/T 36276出具的中国测试报告，通常不包含IEC 62933-5-2附录C所要求的系统级热失控扩散试验数据，亦不含欧盟建筑及防火分区审批所需的UL 9540A热释放速率（HRR）与火势蔓延数据。即便法律上无强制要求，欧盟安装商和主管当局日益普遍地要求提供UL 9540A格式数据，因为该数据用于防火分区尺寸计算。中国制造商鲜少委托进行UL 9540A测试。这一文件缺口是欧盟项目融资和许可阶段的常见障碍。
gap.zht: 主要差距：依GB/T 36276出具的中國測試報告，通常不包含IEC 62933-5-2附錄C所要求的系統級熱失控擴散試驗數據，亦不含歐盟建築及防火分區審批所需的UL 9540A熱釋放速率（HRR）與火勢蔓延數據。即便法律上無強制要求，歐盟安裝商和主管當局日益普遍地要求提供UL 9540A格式數據，因為該數據用於防火分區尺寸計算。中國製造商鮮少委託進行UL 9540A測試。這一文件缺口是歐盟項目融資和許可階段的常見障礙。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 62933-5-2 is referenced in EU member-state grid-connection and building regulations with varying legal force. EN IEC 62933-5-2 is the European adoption of the standard, however its harmonised status under the Low Voltage Directive is not yet confirmed by citation in the EU Official Journal as of mid-2026, partly due to the copyright dispute arising from the Malamud ruling which has blocked new ISO/IEC standards from OJ publication since 2025; it remains the key technical reference for BESS safety but does not currently confer presumption of conformity under LVD. UL 9540A (now 5th Edition, March 2025) is not mandated by EU law but is functionally required by many AHJs and insurers.
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 36276-2023 is a recommended (推荐性) national standard in China. GB 51048-2014 (the mandatory design code for electrochemical storage power stations) has been superseded by GB/T 51048-2025 (issued 31 December 2025, effective 1 April 2026), which is classified as a recommended (推荐性) national standard — a change from the mandatory (强制性) designation of the 2014 predecessor. Exact enforcement scope should be verified against the 2025 text and current NEA project-approval requirements.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] INFORMATIONAL ONLY — Chinese BESS products certified to GB/T 36276 alone are likely to face documentation gaps when seeking EU project permits or financing, specifically the absence of IEC 62933-5-2 system-level thermal-runaway propagation test data and UL 9540A fire-spread data. Manufacturers targeting EU markets should commission supplementary testing to these standards. This is not legal advice; verify current harmonisation status and applicable national requirements with a qualified EU certifier.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考——仅依据GB/T 36276认证的中国储能产品，在申请欧盟项目许可或融资时，很可能面临文件缺口，具体表现为缺乏IEC 62933-5-2系统级热失控扩散试验数据及UL 9540A火势蔓延数据。面向欧盟市场的制造商应委托开展上述标准的补充测试。本内容不构成法律意见，请向具备资质的欧盟认证机构核实当前协调标准状态及适用的各国要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考——僅依據GB/T 36276認證的中國儲能產品，在申請歐盟項目許可或融資時，很可能面臨文件缺口，具體表現為缺乏IEC 62933-5-2系統級熱失控擴散試驗數據及UL 9540A火勢蔓延數據。面向歐盟市場的製造商應委託開展上述標準的補充測試。本內容不構成法律意見，請向具備資質的歐盟認證機構核實當前協調標準狀態及適用的各國要求。
